title: About Me
bio1: I am a pediatric neurologist certified by the Mexican Council of Neurology, trained at the Pediatric Hospital of the National Medical Center of the West (Centro Médico Nacional de Occidente). I completed my specialty in Pediatrics accredited by the University of Guadalajara, and my subspecialty in Pediatric Neurology, accredited by UNAM.
bio2: I am currently an active member of the Mexican Academy of Neurology and the Mexican Society of Pediatric Neurology.
bio3: My practice is focused on providing comprehensive neurological evaluations, with clear explanations and close support for each family. I take the time necessary to ensure parents understand what is happening with their child and feel confident in the treatment plan.
